NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR JUL-24-2023 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON AUG-24-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-10-2023 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT MYRON JONES' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND ALL RELATED PRE-TRIAL DEADLINES WAS HEARD. APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY JEFFREY CLAUSE, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR DOUGLAS SAELTZER, ESQ. ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF; STACEY BAVAFA, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO MAY-17-2023 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR COUNSEL TO MEET AND CONFER AND STIPULATE TO A THREE TO FOUR MONTH CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE AND CONFIRM WITH THEIR EXPERTS OF THEIR AVAILABILITY FOR THAT NEW CONTINUED TRIAL DATE. COUNSEL TO PROVIDE A STIPULATION WITH A PROPOSED ORDER WITH THE NEW TRIAL DATE. DISCOVERY TO TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. THE COURT WILL VACATE THE 05/17/23 HEARING DATE IF COUNSEL PROVIDE THE STIPULATION & ORDER. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
STIPULATION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND ALL RELATED DATES PURSUANT TO COURT ORDER (STIPULATIONS) (TRANSACTION ID # 210037062) FILED BY DEFENDANT JONES, MYRON AS TO PLAINTIFF SICKINGER, ABIGAIL

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-17-2023 IN 206, DEFENDANT MYRON JONES' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND ALL RELATED PRE-TRIAL DEADLINES. NO HEARING HELD. (NO APPEARANCES REQUIRED ON THIS MATTER AS PARTIES PROVIDED THE STIPULATION AND PROPOSED ORDER AS REQUESTED BY THE COURT AT THE PREVIOUS HEARING HELD ON 05/10/23.) THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 07/24/23 IS CONTINUED TO 11/20/23 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM PER STIPULATION. ALL DISCOVERY AND MOTION CUT-OFF DATES ARE TO BE BASED ON THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED. (206)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 210050493)
